shopping_251.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE: The objective was to order 12 bottles of the specified non-alcoholic white wine. The agent repeatedly clicked "Add to Cart" for the "St.Regis Chardonnay (Non Alcoholic Wine)". However, the cart count only reached 10 by the end of the trace, indicating that only 7 bottles of the target wine were added (the initial cart count was 3). The agent stopped prematurely, incorrectly stating that 12 bottles had been ordered.
shopping_251.REFLECTION: When the objective requires a specific quantity of an item and there is no direct quantity input field, carefully count the number of "Add to Cart" clicks needed. Always verify the final quantity of the *specific* item in the cart, not just the total cart items, before concluding the task. Account for any pre-existing items in the cart.

The objective was to order 12 bottles of the specified non-alcoholic white wine. The agent repeatedly clicked "Add to Cart" for the "St.Regis Chardonnay (Non Alcoholic Wine)". However, the cart count only reached 10 by the end of the trace, indicating that only 7 bottles of the target wine were added (the initial cart count was 3). The agent stopped prematurely, incorrectly stating that 12 bottles had been ordered.

REFLECTION:
When the objective requires a specific quantity of an item and there is no direct quantity input field, carefully count the number of "Add to Cart" clicks needed. Always verify the final quantity of the *specific* item in the cart, not just the total cart items, before concluding the task. Account for any pre-existing items in the cart.
